meaning: adj.垂直的,直立的,顶点的,[解]头顶的n.垂直线,垂直面,竖向
examples: There was a vertical drop to the ocean.
The climber inched up a vertical wall of rock.
For some buildings a vertical section is more informative than a plan.
You have a normal vertical straw and someone comes along with a multilateral straw.
There are even a number of vertical deals sites such as wine website Lot18.
